info.title: Work Order Execution Microservice API
info.description: Dealers and technicians can inspect, repair, and maintain equipment by creating digital work orders and service estimates. The API supports step-by-step jobs, segments, checklists, parts, labor, notifications, and integration with Service Delivery.

servers.description: Sandbox (Expert App API — work order microservice)

OAuth2.description: OAuth 2.0. Use the authorization code flow (three-legged) for interactive users, or the client credentials grant for machine-to-machine access. The `axiom` scope is required unless your product documentation states otherwise.

JsonPayload.description: JSON request or response body; shape depends on the operation.

get.description: Retrieve DBS customer records for the authenticated context.
Returns feature toggles available for the current user.
Returns whether a feature is enabled for the given user.

post.description: Upload an image or file attached to a job.

get.description: Download an image or file attached to a job by identifier.

put.description: Replace the image or file for the supplied identifier.

delete.description: Delete an image or file after it is removed from the associated job.

get.description: List inspections filtered by status (for example `COMPLETED`).
Returns all locations for the given location identifier.
Returns all locations for the given user identifier.
View machine information for the supplied serial number.
View warranty details for the given machine.
View a segment related to a work order.
View all segments related to a work order.

post.description: Create a new service quote with optional Expert Services job IDs or checklist ID at segment level.

get.summary: List service quotes by service area
get.description: View all available service quotes grouped by service area.
View a service quote. Optional query `groupby=serviceArea` returns grouping by service area.

put.description: Update a service quote. Optional `reportType=SERVICE_QUOTE_SUMMARY` generates a summary report.

head.description: Returns headers indicating whether the service quote exists.

patch.description: Update specific properties of a service quote.

get.description: View a service quote grouped by service area.

Generate a service quote summary report.

get.description: View all segments for a service quote. Optional `groupby=serviceArea`. Optional `notificationType=PARTS_ONLY_SUMMARY` for parts-only email.

post.description: Create and add a checklist to a segment. Use query `type=byId` with Expert Services checklist ID in body.

parameters.description: When `byId`, body references Expert Services checklist identifier.
